bird.name: 簇蓝鸦
bird.summary: 簇蓝鸦（学名：Cyanocorax dickeyi）是鸦科蓝鸦属的一种，为墨西哥的特有种。全球活动范围约为38,600平方千米。该物种的保护状况被评为近危。 簇蓝鸦的平均体重约为176.0克。栖息地包括亚热带或热带的旱林、亚热带或热带的湿润山地林和河流、溪流。

locations.name: 西馬德雷山脈
locations.summary: 西馬德雷山脈（Sierra Madre Occidental），是墨西哥的主要山脈之一，位於墨西哥高原西緣，其名意为“西部母山脈”。 西馬德雷山脈西北起于美国亚利桑那州图森附近，向东南沿墨西哥太平洋海岸延伸至墨西哥中部境内，全长約1500…

locations.name: 錫那羅亞州
locations.summary: 錫那羅亞州（西班牙語：Sinaloa，西班牙語發音：[sinaˈloa] ，官方名称“锡那罗亚自由主权州”）是墨西哥三十一個州之一，1830年10月14日正式成立，下设20个市，首府兼最大城市为库利亚坎。该州总面积约58,328平方公里，…

locations.name: 杜蘭戈州
locations.summary: 杜蘭戈州（西班牙語：Estado Libre y Soberano de Durango、納瓦特爾語：Tepēhuahcān）是墨西哥的一個州，位於該國的中部偏西北。2003年估計人口為 1,450,000。首府杜蘭戈市。 地理 西部有西…

locations.name: 納亞里特州
locations.summary: 納亞里特州 （西班牙語：Nayarit）是墨西哥三十一個州之一，西臨太平洋。首府特皮克，下分20市。 1887年建立準州，1917年建州。

locations.name: 墨西哥高原
locations.summary: 墨西哥高原（西班牙語：Altiplanicie mexicana）是一個佔據了墨西哥中部和北部大部份面積的乾旱半乾旱高原。平均海拔約1,825公尺（5,988英尺），從北部的美墨邊境一直延伸到南部的跨墨西哥火山帶，西部與西馬德雷山脈接壤，…

relations.subject: 簇蓝鸦
relations.evidence: thumb|right|The tufted jay can be found in pine-oak forests within Sierra Madre Occidental.|alt=An epiphyte-covered oak tree surrounded by pine trees The tufted jay is endemic to Mexico and is only found in a limited range within the Sierra Madre Occidental, in an area of roughly . Within this mountain range, they can be found in eastern Sinaloa, western Durango, and northern Nayarit. This species is most often found at elevations of , but has been found as low as and as high as . The tufted jay inhabits forests throughout its range

relations.subject: 簇蓝鸦
relations.evidence: In the breeding season, they can commonly be found in ravines near water sources. They can sometimes be found at higher elevations into the Mexican Plateau or areas where logging has occurred

relations.subject: 簇蓝鸦
relations.evidence: The primary threat to its survival is habitat destruction due to agricultural expansion and deforestation due to logging and narcotic cultivation
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: 簇蓝鸦
relations.evidence: The primary threat to its survival is habitat destruction due to agricultural expansion and deforestation due to logging and narcotic cultivation
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
